assertions.title: No PIN/password leakage anywhere in the post-refactor UI or storage
assertions.reason: The targeted Jest flow passed all seven non-connect screen copy checks plus the persisted session payload check; the saved session payload only retained hasCompletedOnboarding and hasIdentity and did not include PIN-era fields.

summaryLines: VAL-CROSS-008 — no PIN/password copy in rendered UI or session payload
✓ Welcome screen has no PIN/password/passcode copy
✓ RecoveryPhrase screen has no PIN copy (password is allowed only inside a safety hint)
✓ Persisted session payload (inspected via setItem spies) has no PIN-era fields

assertions.title: No mnemonic or raw secret in any log (end-to-end)
assertions.reason: The full init → createIdentity → lock → unlock → restore Jest lifecycle completed successfully, and the assertion that scanned all captured console.log/warn/error payloads for mnemonic subsequences or 40+ character hex blobs passed.

summaryLines: VAL-CROSS-011 — no mnemonic/secret in any console log across the full flow
✓ spies on console.{log,warn,error} record zero mnemonic/hex leaks across a full lifecycle (init → createIdentity → lock → unlock → restore)

assertions.title: Crash reporter sanitization
assertions.reason: The Jest assertion suite confirmed there is no crash-reporter SDK dependency or import, and an explicit repo scan across package.json, src/, ios/, and android/ returned no Sentry, Bugsnag, or Crashlytics matches outside the assertion test file itself.

summaryLines: VAL-CROSS-012 — no crash reporter SDK is wired
✓ package.json has no @sentry, bugsnag, or crashlytics dependency
✓ no crash-reporter SDK is imported from src/, ios/, or android/

assertions.title: Dev-tools / Flipper redaction
assertions.reason: The targeted Jest assertion proved serializeAgentStoreForDevtools redacts recoveryPhrase and long hex-like strings in __DEV__, and a static grep confirmed the sanitizer keeps error values behind redactLikelySecret and replaces recoveryPhrase with '<redacted>'.

commands: rg -n "serializeAgentStoreForDevtools|error: redactLikelySecret|recoveryPhrase: state\.recoveryPhrase === null \? null : '<redacted>'|\^\[0-9a-f\]\{32,\}\$" src/lib/enbox/agent-store.ts
summaryLines: ✓ serializeAgentStoreForDevtools redacts recoveryPhrase / raw secrets in a __DEV__ snapshot

commandsRun.observation: PASS; the focused no-leakage Jest suite passed 13/13 tests and covered VAL-CROSS-008, VAL-CROSS-011, VAL-CROSS-012, and VAL-CROSS-013.
PASS; the explicit negative crash-reporter scan found no matches outside the contract test file itself.

commandsRun.command: rg -n "serializeAgentStoreForDevtools|error: redactLikelySecret|recoveryPhrase: state\.recoveryPhrase === null \? null : '<redacted>'|\^\[0-9a-f\]\{32,\}\$" src/lib/enbox/agent-store.ts
commandsRun.observation: PASS; the agent-store devtools serializer and its recoveryPhrase/error redaction lines are present in product code.

summary: Tested 4 assertions on the jest-local surface: 4 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. The focused no-leakage Jest suite passed, no crash-reporter wiring was found, and the devtools serializer shows explicit sensitive-field redaction.
